The Universe by the Numbers

The cosmos is vast beyond imagination. Here's a glimpse.

🌍
0+
Exoplanets Confirmed
Worlds orbiting other stars — and counting
🌌
0B
Galaxies Observable
In the observable universe alone
⏳
0M
Years — Universe Age
Years since the Big Bang
☀️
0
Planets in our System
Each unique — from tiny Mercury to vast Jupiter

What You Can Explore

From real-time NASA data to interactive 3D physics simulations.

🌌

3D Solar System

Three.js + WebGL

All 8 planets orbiting in real-time with Saturn's rings, Earth's moon, the asteroid belt, and a glowing corona sun. Click any planet for data.

Open Simulator →
🔭

Exoplanet Explorer

NASA API

Browse 5,700+ confirmed exoplanets from the NASA Exoplanet Archive. Filter, sort, and inspect orbital mechanics and habitability data.

Browse Planets →
📸

NASA APOD

Live Data

Each day, NASA selects a stunning astronomy image. We fetch it live and display it with full scientific context — the universe daily.

See Today's Image ↓ →
📐

Astrophysics Depth

Peer-reviewed

Built on real astrophysics research. Accurate science, not simplified analogies — including stellar evolution, spectral types, and habitability indices.

About the Platform →

Today's View from NASA

The Astronomy Picture of the Day — curated by NASA scientists.

🔭
Loading today's cosmos…

Ready to explore the universe?

Zoom into Saturn's rings, click on Neptune, or browse 5,700 worlds beyond our solar system. No login. No download. Just science.
